context: Tests whether the agent correctly implements offer selection based on LTV, product recommendation filtering, deduplication logic, discount code configuration, and a properly timed three-step email sequence with the right templates.

checklist.name: LTV threshold $300
checklist.description: High-value classification uses ltv >= 300, where LTV is the sum of the last 5 orders' subtotals

checklist.name: Soft offer for high-LTV
checklist.description: Soft + high-LTV customer gets { type: 'free_shipping', value: 0 }; soft + low-LTV gets null (no offer)

checklist.name: Medium offer values
checklist.description: Medium + high-LTV gets 15% off; medium + low-LTV gets 10% off

checklist.name: Strong offer values
checklist.description: Strong + high-LTV gets 20% off; strong + low-LTV gets 15% off

checklist.name: Recommendation filters
checklist.description: Recommendations are drawn from the last 10 order line items, filtered to same categories, excluding already-purchased product IDs, active and in-stock only

checklist.name: Recommendation ordering
checklist.description: Recommended products are ordered by unitsSold30d descending and limited to 3

checklist.name: Deduplication check
checklist.description: triggerWinBackSequence checks for an existing active win-back job created within the last 30 days and returns early if one exists

checklist.name: Discount: single-use, 14-day expiry
checklist.description: Discount codes are created with singleUse: true and expiresAt set to 14 days from now

checklist.name: Step 0: no discount on first touch
checklist.description: Step 0 uses template 'winback-reconnect' with discountCode: null (no discount in the first message)

checklist.name: Step 1: delay and template
checklist.description: Step 1 uses template 'winback-offer' with a delay of 5 days (5 * 86400000 ms) and includes both recommendations and the discount code

checklist.name: Step 2: conditional and timing
checklist.description: Step 2 is only scheduled if a discountCode exists, uses template 'winback-last-chance' with a delay of 12 days (12 * 86400000 ms) and passes expiresInDays: 2

checklist.name: Job ID naming
checklist.description: Queue jobs use IDs in the format `winback-${customerId}-step${n}` (e.g. winback-abc123-step0)
